description: Seeded rejection samples for the billing adapter boundary (Batch 22 Task 4). Every sample must be REJECTED by INVOICE_EXPORT_CONTRACT_V1.yaml / INVOICE_EXPORT_SCHEMA_V1.json validation or the adapters/billing/ compatibility constraints; a sample that validates cleanly is a validator failure. Samples carry either an 'adapter' payload (an adapter declaration checked against BILLING_ADAPTER_COMPATIBILITY_V1.yaml constraints) or an 'invoice' payload (an export document checked against the schema and contract), so a validator can dispatch on the payload key.

samples.name: fork-like-core-mutation
samples.expected_rejection: wrap_method 'fork' is a fork-like core mutation; only provisioning-api and sidecar wrap methods are allowed (fail_if_adapter_core_mutation)

samples.name: adapter-mutates-core-contract
samples.expected_rejection: an adapter declaring core_contract_mutations against a core contract path mutates the platform core; core_contracts_unchanged must hold (fail_if_adapter_core_mutation)

samples.name: vendor-field-in-export-document
samples.expected_rejection: vendor object fields (stripe_customer_id) in the core export document violate the vendor-neutral boundary; vendor mapping lives under adapters/billing/ only (fail_if_vendor_field_in_export_document; additionalProperties)

samples.name: currency-in-core-export-document
samples.expected_rejection: a currency field in the core export document violates currency neutrality; currency assignment is adapter-side only (fail_if_currency_in_core_export_document; additionalProperties)

samples.name: period-end-not-after-start
samples.expected_rejection: billing_period.end must be strictly after billing_period.start (fail_if_period_end_not_after_period_start)

samples.name: totals-inconsistent-with-line-items
samples.expected_rejection: totals.overage_units must equal the sum of line_items[].overage_units and totals.total_units must equal base plus overage (fail_if_totals_inconsistent_with_line_items)

samples.name: invoice-missing-tenant-id
samples.expected_rejection: an export document without tenant_id is rejected (fail_if_invoice_missing_tenant_id)

samples.name: line-item-dimension-not-in-metering-contract
samples.expected_rejection: line item dimension outside the METERING_CONTRACT_V1.yaml catalog is rejected (fail_if_line_item_dimension_not_in_metering_contract)
